title: 写实摄影风格创作
description: A photorealistic, high-resolution commercial photograph of a {argument name="car model and color" default="bright blue Alpine A110 R sports car"} parked in the foreground inside a massive aircraft hangar. The car feature
prompt_raw: A photorealistic, high-resolution commercial photograph of a {argument name="car model and color" default="bright blue Alpine A110 R sports car"} parked in the foreground inside a massive aircraft hangar. The car features a black carbon fiber hood, black roof, black alloy wheels, and a front license plate reading "{argument name="license plate text" default="A110 R"}". Directly behind the car, dominating the background, is a {argument name="airplane model" default="white Airbus A320 commercial airliner"} with a blue tail. The hangar has a highly polished, reflective concrete floor that mirrors the car and plane. To the left, a sign on the metal wall reads "{argument name="hangar sign text" default="HANGAR 05 MAINTENANCE"}". The hangar doors are wide open, revealing a bright, overcast sky and a distant cityscape. The lighting is soft and cinematic, highlighting the sleek aerodynamic curves of both vehicles.
prompt_preview: A photorealistic, high-resolution commercial photograph of a {argument name="car model and color" default="bright blue Alpine A110 R sports car"} parked in the foreground inside a massive aircraft hangar. The car feature
prompt_display_cn:
案例「car model and color」属于摄影写实。这是一张摄影写实类案例，重点在真实镜头感、人物/物体质感、光线、景深、环境和摄影语言。适合改成商业摄影、人像摄影、产品摄影、纪实照片或电影剧照。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A 照片写实, high-resolution commercial photograph of a 【car model and color：bright blue Alpine A110 R sports car】 parked in the foreground inside a massive aircraft hangar. The car features a black carbon fiber hood, black roof, black alloy wheels, and a front license plate reading "【license plate text：A110 R】". Directly behind the car, dominating the 背景, is a 【airplane model：white Airbus A320 commercial airliner】 with a blue tail. The hangar has a highly polished, reflective concrete floor that mirrors the car and plane. To the left, a sign on the metal wall reads "【hangar sign text：HANGAR 05 MAINTENANCE】". The hangar doors are wide open, revealing a bright, overcast sky and a distant cityscape. The 光线ing is soft and 电影感, high光线ing the sleek aerodynamic curves of both vehicles.
prompt_template_cn:
生成一张【拍摄主题】的摄影写实画面。

主体：
画面主体是【主体对象】，处于【动作/状态】，具有真实自然的细节。

场景：
背景环境为【场景地点】，包含【环境元素】，整体氛围为【氛围】。

摄影语言：
使用【镜头类型/焦段】，构图为【构图方式】，光线为【光线条件】，景深为【景深效果】。

质感要求：
皮肤/材质/物体细节真实，避免塑料感和过度磨皮。画面像真实摄影作品。

输出要求：
比例为【画面比例】，风格为【摄影风格】。
